name: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk
summary: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development of real estate and industrial estate projects in Indonesia. The company operates through Real Estate and Support Services segments. It is also involved in the provision of supporting services, including estate management, public transport, and recreation services. In addition, the company engages in construction, purchase, sale, lease, and operation of exhibition spaces, storage facilities, private buildings, malls, shopping centers, hospitals, conference halls, houses of worship, hotels, sports centers, golf courses, clubs, restaurants, entertainment venues, medical, laboratories, pharmacies, office buildings, and parking lots. Further, it offers clean and waste water management services; trading, development, and other services; and transportation, waste management, and recycling services. Additionally, the company is involved in the professional, scientific, and technical activities; and remediation, manpower and business support, and other business activities. PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kemuning Satiatama.
